data.title: Subsea7 Annual Report 2025
data.description: Luxembourg, March 20, 2026 - Today, Subsea 7 S.A. (listed on Oslo Børs as SUBC and ADR as SUBCY) disclosed its Annual Report for the year ending on December 31, 2025. The report encompasses the Consolidated Financial Statements for the Subsea7 Group along with the Financial Statements of Subsea 7 S.A., the Parent Company.

data.title: SalMar - update of issuer credit rating from Nordic Credit Rating
data.description: On March 20, 2026, Nordic Credit Rating revised SalMar ASA's issuer credit rating to BBB with a stable outlook.

data.title: Deepcoin Becomes Official Regional Sponsor of the Argentine Football Association (AFA)
data.description: In Grand Cayman on March 20, 2026, Deepcoin, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, shared news of a strategic collaboration with the Argentine Football Association (AFA). As part of this partnership, Deepcoin is now recognized as an Official Regional Partner of the Argentinian sports organization.

data.title: Persistent Appoints Hari S. Abhyankar as Executive Vice President and Global Head of Private Equity and Professional Services
data.description: Persistent Systems, a renowned global leader in Digital Engineering and Enterprise, is enhancing its concentration on AI-driven transformation for private equity firms and their portfolio companies. This strategic move signifies the company's commitment to leveraging cutting-edge technology to drive innovation and efficiency. Persistent Systems, listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 533179 and on the National Stock Exchange as PERSISTENT, is based in Santa Clara, California, and Pune, India. This development, announced on March 20, 2026, underscores the company's proactive approach towards AI integration in the private equity sector.

data.title: The Future of AI Is Physical: QCraft CEO Dr. James Yu Shares His Vision at Munich's Intelligent Vehicles & Production Conference
data.description: CEO Dr. James Yu of QCraft presented his vision for the future of artificial intelligence (AI) at Munich's Intelligent Vehicles & Production Conference. Discussing the importance of physical components in AI, Dr. Yu highlighted the potential for advancements in the industry. The conference attracted over 500 attendees, showcasing the growing interest and investment in AI technologies.

data.title: 7.7M borrowers defaulted on $181B federal student loans, a record high in delinquency and default rates.
data.description: New statistics from the Education Department reveal that as of the conclusion of last year, approximately 7.7 million individuals had gone into default on a staggering $181 billion worth of federal student loans.

data.title: Record enrollment in New Mexico despite nationwide drop after subsidy expiration, making it an Obamacare success story.
data.description: Enrollment in the Affordable Care Act has decreased nationwide following the conclusion of enhanced federal subsidies. However, in New Mexico, there has been a surge in sign-ups, with record numbers of people enrolling.

data.title: Antengene Announces 2025 Full-Year Results: First TCE Out-licensing Validates Platform Value and Marks Inflection Point Towards 2026 Profitability
data.description: Antengene Corporation Limited, based in Shanghai and Hong Kong, disclosed its financial performance for the full year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, listed as SEHK: 6996.HK, disclosed this information on March 20, 2026. Additionally, Antengene also shared recent accomplishments and advancements in their strategic objectives. Dr. Jay Mei is a key figure involved in these developments.

data.title: Athletic Brewing Company Launches New Clock End Brew in Collaboration with Arsenal
data.description: In a recent collaboration, Athletic Brewing Company, the largest non-alcoholic brewery in America, has introduced a new non-alcoholic red beverage called Clock End at Emirates Stadium. This UK-exclusive offering is part of their growing partnership. The announcement was made on March 20, 2026, in Milford, Connecticut, and San Diego.

data.title: SCANOLOGY Introduces SIMSCAN-S Gen2, Palm-Sized 3D Scanner Delivering 0.015 mm Accuracy for High-Precision Inspection
data.description: A cutting-edge handheld device has been introduced by SCANOLOGY in Hangzhou, China on March 20, 2026. This innovative system aims to assist manufacturers in verifying crucial geometries, speeding up inspection processes, and minimizing expenses related to rework. The new device, named SIMSCAN-S, offers advanced 3D scanning capabilities to enhance accuracy and efficiency in manufacturing operations. With this launch, SCANOLOGY is poised to revolutionize inspection workflows with this state-of-the-art solution.
